title: Leadership Development Path
subtitle: A pathway for servant leaders building long-term civic infrastructure in Arkansas.
description: An advanced leadership track combining civic context, coalition stewardship, strategy, and ecosystem building.
audience: Executive leaders, movement builders, organizational directors, coalition conveners.

milestones.title: Leadership Context
milestones.description: Complete the leadership context milestone by finishing the required Arkansas civics modules.

course_refs.reason: Ground leadership in Arkansas civic reality.
Understand the historical burden and opportunity of leadership.

milestones.title: Coalitions and Shared Purpose
milestones.description: Complete the coalitions and shared purpose milestone by finishing the required Arkansas civics modules.

course_refs.reason: Develop coalition leadership and shared-purpose practice.
Learn how shared pain and shared story shape legitimacy.

milestones.title: Strategy Under Pressure
milestones.description: Complete the strategy under pressure milestone by finishing the required Arkansas civics modules.

course_refs.reason: Study execution, sequencing, and public strategy.
Learn to lead through backlash and adaptation.

milestones.title: Stewardship and Replication
milestones.description: Complete the stewardship and replication milestone by finishing the required Arkansas civics modules.

course_refs.reason: Build long-tail institutions and replicable public systems.
Ensure leadership stays connected to real people and ground game.
